title: LINC MADRAS - 211info
text: LINC MADRAS LINC MADRAS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides household goods, budgeting, job, and life skills mentoring, and connections to local food banks and community meals. May also assist with rent, electric, and propane vouchers when available. Assistance is limited and not guaranteed. Utility assistance is available once per year. 278 SE 8th Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Wednesday 10am-2pm Email (541) 475-4446 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 475-4446 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Depending on the service, requirements may include photo ID, proof of income, a bill, shutoff notice, or eviction notice, and a rent or lease agreement AREA SERVED: Jefferson County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of 8th and E Streets (East door). The Cascade East Transit bus 20 stops at 7th Street at the Jefferson County Library 1 block from the location. Services: Bedding/Linen Comprehensive Information and Referral Electric Service Payment Assistance Furniture Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Kitchenware Personal Financial Counseling Personal/Grooming Supplies Rent Payment Assistance Small Kitchen Appliances Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - JOB AND LIFE CHANGE COACHING MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING CLOSET If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINC MADRAS
